news.t: Cambria Expands 351 Exchange ETF Lineup with Launch of Cambria Global EW 2 ETF (GEQ)

holdings.infoBox: GEQ is an equity ETF with a total of 740 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 3.58%, iShares Core S&P 500 ETF at 3.29%, Microsoft at 3.03%, NVIDIA at 2.70%, and State Street® SPDR® S&P 500® ETF at 2.49%.

overview.description: The Cambria Global EW 2 ETF (GEQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund provides diversified exposure to global equities through an actively managed portfolio concentrated on large-cap companies. It offered initial investors a way to diversify taxable holdings via a 351 exchange.

data.title: Cambria Expands 351 Exchange ETF Lineup with Launch of Cambria Global EW 2 ETF (GEQ)
data.text: MANHATTAN BEACH, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $GEQ #351Exchange--Cambria Investment Management, an innovator in quantitative investment strategies and tax-aware solutions, and ETF Architect, a trusted ...
